prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约4385→3886→4433→4322→9216，2025年出现大幅后移，较2024年增加约4894名，主要受专业组拆分及烟台研究院专业影 响；本省物理类计划2021年49人、2022年51人、2023年51人、2024年49人、2025年53人；2026年计划81人，较2025年扩招约53%，大幅增加招生名额，竞 争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第30名持续上升至2026年第24名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增 强；2024年声誉评价为明显负面，主要因招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌；抖音综合热度为高热（总排名第13），短视频平台曝光度高；2024年 投档异常高关注，但2025年位次已大幅后移消化了部分影响；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植 物保护A、生物学A，农林学科实力顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高热/推荐，该校相关 专业受益；本省2026年物理类考生估算约14.65万人，较2025年增加约20.7%，竞争加剧；学校位于北京，地理位置优越， 对甘肃考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年招生计划大幅扩招53%的显著利好、学校排名持 续上升的吸引力增强，以及本省物理类考生增加约20.7%带来的竞争加剧，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，整体录取难度下降；预测最低位次约12037名，区间11537–12537名。

- 计算机类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11537–12537名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。一档的理科试验班和计算机类竞争最激烈，需位次明显优于区间上限；二档的食品、 农学、动物医学等王牌专业性价比高，适合位次在区间中段的考生；三档的烟台研究院专业录取门槛相对较低，适合位次接近区间下限的考生作为保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 4385 → 3886 → 4433 → 4322 → 9216, with a significant drop in 2025, an increase of about 4894 places compared to 2024, mainly affected by the splitting of major groups and the Yantai Research Institute majors; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 49 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 81, an increase of about 53% compared to 2025, significantly expanding enrollment quotas, greatly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, with improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2024 reputation evaluation was significantly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication and unreasonable major settings leading to a sharp drop in admission cutoffs; Douyin comprehensive popularity is high (total ranking 13th), with high exposure on short video platforms; the 2024 admission anomaly attracted high attention, but the 2025 ranking has already dropped significantly, absorbing some of the impact; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 7 disciplines at A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, Biology A, with top-tier agricultural and forestry disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have high social popularity/recommendation, benefiting related majors at this university; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 146,500, an increase of about 20.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, with a superior geographical location, strongly attracting Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant drop in 2025 rankings, the significant benefit of a 53% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, the increased attractiveness due to the university's rising rankings, and the intensified competition from an approximately 20.7% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, overall admission difficulty decreases; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12037, with a range of 11537–12537.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Life Science)
- Science Experimental Class (Information Science)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Biological Sciences
- Agronomy
- Veterinary Medicine
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Electrical Engineering/Mechanical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry
- Water Resources
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Business Administration
- Yantai Research Institute Majors (Turf Science and Engineering, Facility Agriculture Science and Engineering, Viticulture and Enology, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11537–12537, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 Science Experimental Classes and Computer Science are the most competitive, requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range; Tier 2 majors such as Food Science, Agronomy, and Veterinary Medicine offer high cost-performance, suitable for candidates with rankings in the middle of the range; Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute majors have relatively lower admission thresholds, suitable for candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range as safety choices.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济学类/工商管理类社会热度 分化观望，文科经管类专业热度平稳；本省2026年历史类考生估算约7.22万人，较2025年增加约23.6%，竞争加剧；学校 位于北京，地理位置优越，对甘肃考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次基本稳定的走势、2026年招生计划持平、本 省历史类考生增加约23.6%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校排名上升的吸引力增强，预计录取难度略有上升；预测最低位次约1498名，区间1318–1678名。

- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、大数据管理与应用）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1318–1678名内，历史类招生专业仅5个且分两档。建议位次优于区间上限可冲刺一档的经济学类和工商管理类（校本部专业）；位次在区间中后段以三档烟台研 究院专业为主力保底。烟台研究院专业虽录取门槛较低，但需注意培养模式为北京一年+烟台三年，且不得转入此类型以外专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum ranking for History Category approximately 1561→1528, rankings basically stable around 1500 over two years, 2025 slightly up by 33 compared to 2024, fluctuation very small; provincial History Category enrollment plan 5 in 2024, 14 in 2025, 14 in 2026, after significant expansion in 2025, 2026 plan remains unchanged, enrollment scale stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking continuously rose from 30th in 2021 to 24th in 2026, ranking steadily improving in recent years, school comprehensive strength and recognition enhanced; 2024 reputation evaluation clearly negative, mainly due to poor enrollment communication leading to a sharp drop in admission cutoff; Douyin comprehensive heat high (total ranking 13th), short video platform exposure high; History Category enrollment majors few and mostly Yantai Research Institute majors, relatively limited impact from reputation fluctuations; Fifth round discipline evaluation A- and above 7, but mainly agriculture and forestry disciplines, relatively low direct correlation with History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration, Marketing, E-commerce).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics/Business Administration social popularity divided and wait-and-see, liberal arts economics and management majors popularity stable; provincial 2026 History Category candidates estimated approximately 72,200, an increase of about 23.6% compared to 2025, competition intensifies; school located in Beijing, geographical location superior, strong attraction for Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining basically stable ranking trend from 2024–2025, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, intensified competition due to about 23.6% increase in provincial History Category candidates, and enhanced attraction from rising school ranking, admission difficulty expected to slightly increase; predicted minimum ranking approximately 1498, range 1318–1678.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economics (International Economics and Trade, Finance, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (History Category enrollment majors few, Tier 1 and Tier 3 already cover all majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Public Administration (Yantai Research Institute)
- Marketing (Yantai Research Institute)
- E-commerce (Yantai Research Institute).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Ranking within predicted range 1318–1678, History Category enrollment majors only 5 and divided into two tiers. It is recommended that candidates with ranking better than the upper limit can aim for Tier 1 Economics and Business Administration (main campus majors); candidates with ranking in the middle to lower part of the range should mainly rely on Tier 3 Yantai Research Institute majors as safety. Although Yantai Research Institute majors have lower admission thresholds, note that the training model is one year in Beijing plus three years in Yantai, and transfer to majors outside this type is not allowed.
